microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ business impact across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, self-service model for domain stakeholders.

Built and deployed an **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring end-to-end workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — tracking throughput, cycle time, and human-intervention rate as core production KPIs.

Shipped Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience drill in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects, and establishing a reusable validation pattern adopted across the broader resilience engineering org.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating auth, data flows, and safe rollback procedures.
microsoft_2023: Drove **production adoption** of AI-powered code generation workflows by running hands-on demos and enablement sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and turning non-builders into active workflow operators.

Migrated documentation retrieval to an **AI-powered semantic search pipeline**, enforcing rigorous metadata and grounding standards that cut lookup time by 83% and improved agent context quality for downstream LLM-powered tooling.

Surfaced critical feature gaps by conducting **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation as a high-leverage automation capability.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target the highest-impact workflow gaps first.

Mapped and quantified 81 hours of manual operational toil per region launch across 20+ service teams, then built a **structured automation roadmap** to eliminate critical-path bottlenecks — directly informing infrastructure workflow investments.

Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** tracking operational toil and automation coverage across 140+ teams, giving domain leadership real-time KPI visibility to prioritize deployment pipeline investments and measure throughput gains.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by mapping system dependencies across 1,200+ stations and defining a phased transition strategy with explicit human-in-the-loop checkpoints and safe rollback procedures.

Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration pattern reused across subsequent rollout phases.

Prioritized and resolved 40+ high-severity backlog tickets by facilitating Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the **developer intake workflow** and reducing queue cycle time across a cross-functional robotics engineering team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end CRM workflow for 200+ monthly proposals — mapping structured data flows across scoping, invoicing, and follow-up stages to eliminate handoff gaps and accelerate the sales cycle.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search profiles to improve top-of-funnel throughput without increasing ad spend.

Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering a pricing model that gave leadership quantified, KPI-backed prioritization guidance on high-value job categories.
